title: FeedbackTask
description: An evaluation template defining the schema, instructions, and tag selectors for grading Log10 completions.

id.description: The unique identifier for this task.

created_at_ms.description: Unix epoch timestamp (milliseconds) when this task was created.

name.description: Human-readable name of the feedback task.

instruction.description: Instructions shown to human reviewers when submitting feedback for this task.

json_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the structure and validation rules for feedback values.

completion_tags_selector.description: Tag-matching expression that determines which completions surface for grading under this task.
